description_long: This barn complex consists of two main structures and an adjacent fenced enclosure. The larger building features a classic gambrel roof, vertical siding, and a prominent central double door, with a covered porch area and a wooden fence extending from its side. The second structure is a smaller, rectangular outbuilding with a simple gable roof and several small windows, likely serving as a storage shed or auxiliary barn. The fenced area is constructed from wooden posts and rails, forming a rectangular pen suitable for livestock or equipment storage. The barn's exterior displays weathered wood textures, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance typical of agricultural buildings. Windows are sparsely distributed, with the main barn having a few small, evenly spaced windows and the outbuilding featuring similar small windows on its sides. The overall layout and design evoke a traditional American rural setting, with practical features for farming or animal husbandry.
description: A rustic barn complex with a gambrel-roofed main barn, a smaller gable-roofed outbuilding, and a wooden fenced enclosure, all featuring weathered wood textures and sparse windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the barn complex from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the fenced enclosure, the porch of the main barn, and the roof shapes of both buildings.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct frontal view of the main barn, showcasing its double doors, porch, and vertical siding, with the outbuilding and fence visible to the right.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of both buildings, emphasizing the rooflines and the full extent of the fenced area.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, clearly showing the open entrance of the outbuilding, the main barn's porch, and the arrangement of the fence.
attribute_roof_type: gambrel roof on main barn, gable roof on outbuilding
attribute_siding_pattern: vertical board and batten on main barn, horizontal lap siding on outbuilding
attribute_door_style: double hinged doors on main barn, single large opening on outbuilding
attribute_window_arrangement: few small, evenly spaced windows on both buildings
